title: Executive Order 10760—Creating an Emergency Board To Investigate a Dispute Between the Trans World Airlines, Inc., and Certain of its Employees

flags.justification: A three-member board with powers defined entirely by the Railway Labor Act, with an explicit conflict-of-interest exclusion, consistent with EO 9379 and EO 12874.
The Board's powers are entirely defined by the Railway Labor Act.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A single-dispute, bounded-duration investigatory board by its nature under the Railway Labor Act framework.
This exercises the statutory Railway Labor Act emergency-board process as Congress designed it.
The Railway Labor Act's broader framework provides real external checks.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
